identity.title: Who do you want to become?
identity.subtitle: Choose up to 3 that resonate. These become your north star.
identity.otherPlaceholder: e.g., A better parent, A minimalist…
identity.hintRemaining: {{count}} more to go, or continue as is

struggles.title: What's been getting in your way?
struggles.subtitle: Pick everything that applies. No judgment here.

options.consistency: I start habits but don't stick with them
options.forgetting: I forget to do things I want to do
options.motivation: I know what to do but don't feel motivated
options.busy: I'm too tired or busy for new habits
options.tracking: I lose track of my progress
